issues.description: Missing requirement that target character must be rested. The official text specifies 'K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters' but the DSL target has no rested requirement.
Missing 'up to 1' optionality on the KO action. The official text says 'up to 1' indicating the action is optional.
Missing 'up to 1' optionality on the PlayFromHand action. The official text says 'play up to 1 [Zou]' indicating this action is also optional.
